title: An open-access volume electron microscopy atlas of whole cells and tissues
abstract: An open-access atlas of volume electron microscopy data of whole cells and tissues imaged with enhanced FIB-SEM at 4-8 nm isotropic resolution. Provides high-resolution 3D ultrastructural data for diverse cell types and tissues, serving as a community resource for cell biology and connectomics research.
notes: New paper. Open-access EM atlas resource from Hess/Bhatt lab at Janelia.
